documents.DOCUMENT_TEXT:
Subject: Green Tower Office Building – delivery delay and updated look-ahead

Hi team,
The delivery of fire-rated door leafs from MainSteel GmbH for W-15 has slipped by 2 working days because of late release from the yard. Sarah Weber must arrange access, tools, and delivery timing with FensterPro Bayern for work at east façade line. Open point: the final sign-off for the coordination issue at service core remains with the client team. Please confirm the next steps by end of day.

Regards,
Michael Schmidt
Project Manager
Green Tower Office Building, Würzburg, Germany

Sarah Weber must arrange access, tools, and delivery timing with FensterPro Bayern for work at east façade line.
Open point: the final sign-off for the coordination issue at service core remains with the client team.

documents.DOCUMENT_TEXT:
Subject: Green Tower Office Building – quality hold and site re-inspection

Hi team,
David Braun noted a misaligned frame on W-18 during the walkdown, most visible near east façade line. David Braun will keep responsibility for the inspection record and photo evidence from the site visit. Michael Schmidt confirmed that the alternative supplier route can be used for the next delivery batch. Please confirm the next steps by end of day.

Regards,
Michael Schmidt
Project Manager
Green Tower Office Building, Würzburg, Germany

documents.DOCUMENT_TEXT:
Subject: Green Tower Office Building – variation claim and budget check

Hi team,
Nordholz Doors submitted a variation claim of €4,600 after the crew had to extend overtime at service core. The follow-up inspection for D-202 will move from 06 Jun 2026 to 07 Jun 2026 to keep the trade sequence aligned. The team needs to close the follow-up task in the tracker before the next coordination meeting. Please confirm the next steps by end of day.

Regards,
Michael Schmidt
Project Manager
Green Tower Office Building, Würzburg, Germany

documents.DOCUMENT_TEXT:
Subject: Green Tower Office Building – approval request and method statement

Hi team,
The project team approved the revised method statement for D-202 with the condition that the hold point stays in place. Open point: the subcontractor still has to confirm whether the missing tag belongs to drywall studs or the spare pack. Sarah Weber is responsible for confirming the subcontractor attendance and the unloading bay booking. Please confirm the next steps by end of day.

Regards,
Michael Schmidt
Project Manager
Green Tower Office Building, Würzburg, Germany

documents.DOCUMENT_TEXT:
Subject: Green Tower Office Building – quality hold and site re-inspection

Hi team,
David Braun noted a surface blemish on D-205 during the walkdown, most visible near meeting room stack. The replacement of the damaged component at R-301 is expected to add roughly €8,100 to the subcontract package. The pour or installation window at lift lobby needs a revised slot, and Sarah Weber should confirm the new date. Please confirm the next steps by end of day.

Regards,
Michael Schmidt
Project Manager
Green Tower Office Building, Würzburg, Germany

documents.DOCUMENT_TEXT:
Subject: Green Tower Office Building – delivery delay and updated look-ahead

Hi team,
The delivery of anchor bolts from Rhine Safety Supplies for R-302 has slipped by 2 working days because of a blocked unloading bay. The sample from Keller & Sohn Services did not fully meet the finish requirement, so a re-inspection is needed before release. Michael Schmidt confirmed that the alternative supplier route can be used for the next delivery batch. Please confirm the next steps by end of day.

Regards,
Michael Schmidt
Project Manager
Green Tower Office Building, Würzburg, Germany
